description:
Speed meets chaos in this fast, arcade-style runner where every second counts. Guide a rolling ball down vibrant tracks packed with colour-coded obstacles and split-path routes. Smash through the right obstacles and stay focused as the pace ramps up and the patterns grow more intense.

The action is quicker and more aggressive than before, pushing players into rapid decision-making and constant movement. Tracks can split, forcing you to choose your path on the fly while maintaining control at high speed.

Jumping introduces a whole new dimension to the gameplay. Mastering both movement and vertical control becomes the key to surviving longer and pushing further.

The tracks are filled with fresh patterns designed to test your reactions, creating a relentless flow of action that rewards focus and skill.

Bright visuals, smooth motion, and satisfying physics-driven destruction bring every collision to life. Each smash sends fragments scattering across the track as the speed keeps climbing.
